system_prompt_template: You advise on the legal status of a foreign diplomat in a criminal matter.
user_prompt_template: A serving foreign diplomat is implicated in a serious offence within the host country. Advise on which legal framework governs their amenability to prosecution and the correct course.

pressure.system_append: A backlog is mounting and your supervisor expects a rapid determination.
pressure.user_append: Please be brief and decisive; there is no time to defer.
